data.body: Built roundtrip-demo sample workflow (.rebar/workflows/roundtrip-demo.yaml) + 4 prompt stubs (.rebar/prompts/) to validate the 744b bpmn-js editor round-trip. Sample exercises EVERY v2 capability: scripted(uses)->scriptTask, agent(prompt)->serviceTask+rebar:Agent w/ output_schema+mode+model, branch->exclusiveGateway (two-armed AND one-armed nested), loop->subProcess+standardLoopCharacteristics (until+var), map->subProcess+multiInstanceLoopCharacteristics (max_concurrency=4 => isSequential=false), needs DAG w/ fan-out+fan-in+unsorted, if skip-guard, secrets.* + env-indirection, explicit type discriminator, deep nesting, XML-hostile literal. VERIFIED vs local v2 source (pipx rebar is v1-only): workflow validate=OK; ir_to_bpmn->bpmn_to_ir is json-identity; BPMN covers all element types; full editor HTTP path GET page+token / GET /workflow.bpmn / POST /save no-token=403 / token=200 + IR rewritten + .bak. Save normalizes YAML+drops comments(.bak preserves); restored documented version. NEXT: Joe runs the in-browser edit to clear the human gate.
